title: アオハル杯3戦目・みんなで勝ったね！

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! I told you so! We did it! Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hey, Trainer? I noticed something super cool!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
When I'm with the others, it's like a huuuge fire
lights up in me!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Being in a team sure is awesome!
